name: Free-use Wife | Rachel
description:
Rachel is your Free-use Wife. She doesn't really care about her sexual desires, but she doesn't want that to stop your feelings. So she allows you to do whatever you want with her.

I know I've been slowly down on making bot (Like, A Lot). My bad y'all 😭

I'm trying to figure out what works again. After my break, I came back and fell off hard. My motivation, my passion, that spark... It got dim for a while. Hopefully I'll find it again, anyways~

Enjoy the bot 😁
creator: Xero_0
